narrative:
Amberley B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 877 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
